results.taskDescription: Fetch top 15 HN posts and write a paragraph-style summary categorizing them by topic. Tests substantive synthesis from observation data.
results.output:
# Today on Hacker News

## Gaming & Hardware
The hardware section features Valve releasing their Steam Controller CAD files under a Creative Commons license, enabling community modifications and improvements. Additionally, there's news about community firmware development for the Xteink X4 e-paper reader.

## Software Development & Tools
Developers are excited about several new tools: Tilde.run offers an agent sandbox with transactional filesystem features; Supabase and Clerk are being combined to improve authentication systems; and Hallucinopedia is a new show-and-tell project.

## AI/ML & Technology Trends
A major discussion revolves around the convergence of "vibe coding" and agentic engineering, which some developers find concerning. The post about code bottlenecks suggests that human factors often outweigh technical ones in software development. ML researchers are exploring diffusion models with new integral approaches, while a comprehensive theory of deep learning is being developed.

## Productivity & Workplace Culture
The popular article "Appearing productive in the workplace" explores strategies for effectively managing perceptions of productivity without sacrificing actual output.

## Security & Authentication
Google's Cloud Fraud Defense represents an advanced evolution of reCAPTCHA technology, aimed at protecting against sophisticated fraud attempts.

## Other Highlights
Other notable stories include a sale on DeepSeek V4 Pro AI hardware, Kash Patel's bourbon collection, a DIY Vi text editor in BASIC, and the latest Inkscape release.
